examples: I wanted to make music that was recognizably pop but had a different twist.
Habits are a curse, but there is no recognizably human form of life without them.
Some of its characteristics, such as long arms and a protruding nose, are recognizably human.
Journey is recognizably orchestral yet spare and distanced from the dramatic surges that frequent other videogame soundtracks.
The beer from a long time ago was recognizably the same, but at the same time, it was rather different.
